title: Hub Teams Registry Schema
description: Schema for teams.json in hub registry. Teams group spokes by shared purpose, commercial intent, or relationship.

purpose.description: Why this team exists, what connects these spokes

commercial.description: True if team is commercially linked (wins should be publicized)

public_facing.description: True if team represents public-facing products/services

_instructions.for_hub_ai: Read this schema to validate teams.json. Use teams to determine cross-spoke suggestion relevance.
_instructions.for_ozi: Before surfacing cross-spoke suggestion, check if source and target share a team. If no shared team, skip suggestion. If shared team with commercial=true, frame wins for publicizing.
_instructions.usage: A spoke with no team membership is standalone — never suggest for cross-promotion. A spoke can belong to multiple teams with different relevance in each.
